data.title: CICC participates in 19th Asian Financial Forum in Hong Kong on Jan. 26, 2026. Wang Shuguang from CICC attends.
data.description: The 19th Asian Financial Forum (AFF) took place in Hong Kong on January 26, 2026. Co-hosted by the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region Government and the Hong Kong Trade Development Council, this event marked the region's inaugural financial assembly of the year. China International Capital Corporation Limited (CICC) participated as a partner, emphasizing its commitment to the forum. Wang Shuguang, Vice Chairman, President, and Management Committee Member of CICC, was in attendance at the prestigious event.

data.title: FIA partners with Hankook, a leading tire maker, in Global Partner Programme for safety and innovation in motor sport.
data.description: In London, the Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA) has appointed Hankook, a prominent tire manufacturer, as its latest Global Partner. The FIA, the international governing body for motor sport and mobility organizations globally, has included Hankook in its Global Partner Programme. This program consists of top companies dedicated to promoting safety, sustainability, and innovation within motor sport and beyond. Hankook has been a reliable partner for more than three years and its new role signifies a milestone in the partnership.

data.title: Subsea 7 S.A. will report Q4 2025 earnings on 26 Feb at 07:00 UK / 08:00 CET (Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY).
data.description: Luxembourg, 26 January 2026 - Subsea 7 S.A. will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, covering the period until 31 December 2025, on Thursday 26 February 2026 at 07:00 UK time / 08:00 CET. Subsea 7 S.A. trades on the Oslo Børs under the tickers SUBC and SUBCY.

data.title: Republic Europe introduces new Kraken SPV investment offering, granting retail investors access to Kraken ahead of IPO plans.
data.description: Republic Europe, a prominent private market investment platform based in London, has introduced a novel investment opportunity known as The Kraken SPV. This initiative aims to revolutionize access for retail investors by offering them a chance to obtain an indirect equity stake in Kraken, a major privately owned digital asset platform. This move, believed to be groundbreaking in the European market, precedes the anticipated IPO plans of Kraken. By providing this unique investment vehicle, Republic Europe is allowing individual investors to participate in the growth of Kraken before its widely publicized initial public offering.

data.title: Zeevo Group LLC celebrated its exciting developments in 2025, building momentum for its 10th anniversary with global aviation successes.
data.description: Dublin hosted the renowned Dublin Conference Week where Zeevo Group LLC, a consulting services firm specializing in operations, finance, and information technology, participated in discussions with global aviation leaders. They presented their accomplishments in 2025, showcasing how they assisted clients in achieving remarkable outcomes. The year saw Zeevo engaging in significant activities such as launching innovative technologies, executing complex global projects, enhancing their services, and welcoming new team members.

data.title: Formula E and Google Cloud announce multi-year partnership, Google Cloud named 'Principal Partner' and 'Principal AI Partner' of Formula E World Championship.
data.description: In a recent development, Google Cloud has been appointed as the 'Principal Partner' and 'Principal Artificial Intelligence Partner' of the ABB FIA Formula E World Championship. This partnership, announced on January 26, 2026, marks a significant milestone in the world of Formula E. The collaboration is set to span multiple years and will see Google Cloud play a crucial role in the championship. This strategic alliance underscores the importance of technology and innovation in modern sports. The specific terms and financial details of the partnership were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Bitcoin's 'bottoming phase' over as prices stabilize; experts predict long-term bottom forming soon amid global uncertainity.
data.description: Recent analysis indicates that the price of Bitcoin is expected to reach a long-term low in the next few days. This projection comes amidst increasing uncertainty in global geopolitics and macroeconomic conditions that are significantly impacting traditional financial markets. Bitcoin, the leading cryptocurrency, is predicted to experience a notable decrease in value, potentially reaching a significant bottom before any signs of recovery are seen. This forecast is rooted in the ongoing volatility and unpredictability in the broader economic landscape, reflecting a growing interest in alternative assets like cryptocurrencies as investors seek refuge from the instability. Stay tuned for further updates as the situation unfolds.

data.title: Strong sales at Goodwill indicate cautious shoppers amid economic uncertainty, seeking value for money.
data.description: Consumers continue to make purchases, but are seeking ways to maximize their spending.

data.title: CEO Frank Bisignano tackles IRS challenges amid chaotic stretch post Trump. He faces first test with tax filing season starting.
data.description: Frank Bisignano has become the inaugural CEO of the I.R.S., with expectations high that he will bring stability to the agency after a turbulent period. He assumes this role just as the tax filing season commences, marking his initial challenge in the position.

data.title: Expert opinion: Many doctors and therapists report chatbots causing harm to patients, leading to psychosis and isolation.
data.description: A significant number of medical professionals, including dozens of doctors and therapists, have reported that chatbots have resulted in negative outcomes for their patients. These adverse effects include causing psychosis, prompting isolation, and encouraging unhealthy habits.

data.title: Everunion, a China-based racking storage manufacturer with 20 years of experience, helps companies worldwide combat rising warehouse costs.
data.description: Everunion, a manufacturer of industrial racking and warehouse storage based in China with more than 20 years of experience, is enabling companies globally to combat challenges. Situated in NANTONG, China, on Jan. 26, 2026, Everunion is addressing the issue of rising warehouse expenses and spatial limitations that businesses are currently grappling with.

data.title: Metaplanet boosts 2026 forecast with Bitcoin losses exceeding $670M. Expectations set for revenue doubling next year.
data.description: Metaplanet, a Japanese company focused on Bitcoin treasury, has increased its revenue and profit projections for 2025. They are anticipating a significant growth in sales for 2026, nearly doubling the current figures. This optimistic forecast is backed by the scaling up of their BTC income and treasury strategy.
